_readme: Copy to .claude/settings.json. Adapt commands to your stack. Hooks are deterministic — they run regardless of what Claude decides. Permissions pre-approve commands so Claude doesn't ask every time.
_mcp_readme: MCP servers extend Claude with filesystem access, web search, databases, GitHub, etc. Remove this block if you don't need it. See https://modelcontextprotocol.io for the full server list.

mcpServers._note: Remove this _note key before use. Uncomment what you need.

filesystem._comment: Read/write access to directories outside the workspace.

github._comment: GitHub API: issues, PRs, files. Requires GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN.

permissions._package_manager_note: Add your package manager commands below. Examples:

hooks._comment: Auto-format on every file edit. Replace with your stack's formatter. Examples:
hooks.command: echo 'Add your formatter command here' 2>&1 || true

hooks._comment: Typecheck before Claude ends its turn. Replace with your stack's type check. Examples:
hooks.command: echo 'Add your typecheck command here' 2>&1 || true

hooks._comment: Runs once when Claude Code launches. Optional — use for health checks or status messages.
